title: Deal Queue With Detail Panel
description: ARCHETYPE: queue_workflow. Build a web app page at '/deals' with an app shell, a selectable deals table, and a right detail panel. The detail panel MUST use the canonical `detail panel for selected_deal:` syntax and MUST include customer text, a dollars display called 'Value', status text, and an `actions:` bar with Reject, Counter, and Approve buttons.
skeleton:
build for web and javascript backend

page 'Deal Review' at '/deals':

steps.name: Panel shows customer, value, and status
